narrative: Hotter-than-expected New Zealand Q2 CPI at 4.1% bolsters RBNZ hike bets, lifting NZD/USD to 0.5869 as the week's G10 leader (+0.62% avg); US-Iran tensions introduce a geopolitical risk premium, supporting USD/JPY at 162.51 despite intervention risk. Gold higher +0.35%; equities -0.19%; DXY +0.02%; VIX 18.6. Watch ECB Rate Decision Thursday at 12:15 UTC for hawkish guidance.
